personalInfo.name: Barak Goren
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer (Front-end Focus)
personalInfo.shortBio: Full Stack Developer with strong front-end expertise, building scalable, production-grade web and mobile systems.
personalInfo.bio:
I'm a Full Stack Developer with a strong front-end focus, working in production environments across web and mobile.

I specialize in React and Next.js with TypeScript, building maintainable component architectures, optimizing performance, and handling complex state at scale (Redux / Zustand). On the backend side, I build and maintain REST APIs and data flows, enforce runtime validation with Zod, and work hands-on with Prisma and relational databases (PostgreSQL / MariaDB) including schema design, migrations, and query optimization.

I've shipped multiple live mobile app versions with major functional and architectural changes, implemented payments/subscriptions in production, and delivered features for large-scale systems serving hundreds of thousands of users.

claver-hr.title: Claver HR
claver-hr.description: A full-stack, multi-tenant HR management platform for managing job openings and candidate applications — built with Next.js, Express, and PostgreSQL.
claver-hr.longDescription:
Claver HR lets companies publish job openings on a branded public page and track candidates through a fully customizable hiring pipeline.

Built with Next.js 16 (App Router) and Express.js, it supports multi-tenancy, dynamic application forms, pipeline stage management, Cloudflare R2 file storage, Resend email integration, AI-powered applicant analytics, and automated test reporting.
claver-hr.overview: A production-grade, multi-tenant HR platform built end-to-end. Companies get a branded job board and a powerful dashboard for managing hiring pipelines, applicant tracking, team communication, and AI-driven candidate insights.

multiTenancy.title: Multi-Tenancy
multiTenancy.description: Each company has its own branded slug, job board, users, and fully isolated data.

dynamicForms.title: Dynamic Application Forms
dynamicForms.description: Define custom form fields per role — text, textarea, select, file upload, and more.

hiringPipeline.title: Customizable Hiring Pipeline
hiringPipeline.description: Per-role configurable stages with full applicant progression history tracked on a timeline.

fileStorage.title: Cloud File Storage
fileStorage.description: Résumé uploads to Cloudflare R2 (S3-compatible), served via short-lived presigned URLs.

email.title: Email Communication
email.description: Send personalized emails to candidates directly from the platform via Resend, with full delivery history per application.

emailTemplates.title: Reusable Email Templates
emailTemplates.description: Handlebars-powered templates with variable substitution for personalized, consistent messaging.

jwtAuth.title: Secure JWT Authentication
jwtAuth.description: Access + refresh token pair with rotation on every use and secure HttpOnly cookie storage.

aiAnalytics.title: AI-Powered Analytics
aiAnalytics.description: Evaluate applicants with a customizable rubric, generate per-candidate strength/weakness reports, and get a pool-wide summary.

globalSearch.title: Global Search
globalSearch.description: Search across all system entities — roles, applications, users, email templates — with a single unified search bar.

csvExport.title: CSV Export
csvExport.description: Export applications to CSV for external processing, reporting, or integration with other tools.

global-search.title: Global Search
global-search.description: A unified search bar that queries across all system entities — roles, applications, users, email templates, and more — from a single interface.

global-usage.title: Superadmin Usage Dashboard
global-usage.description: The superadmin dashboard provides a bird's-eye view of infrastructure usage across all companies on the platform.

plan-restrictions.title: Plan-Based Feature Restrictions
plan-restrictions.description: Feature access is gated by subscription plan. Companies only see and interact with features available on their current plan.

public-company-page.title: Public Job Board
public-company-page.description: Each company gets a branded public job board at /[company-slug] where candidates can browse all open roles — no account required.

public-role-page.title: Public Role Detail Page
public-role-page.description: Candidates see a detailed role page with job requirements and a fully custom application form. Submissions are tracked without requiring an account.

role-edit.title: Role Editor
role-edit.description: Admins can edit role requirements — used for display on the public page and as criteria for AI scoring — and configure custom application form fields per role.

role-piplines.title: Pipeline Stage Management
role-piplines.description: A visual pipeline editor where admins can add, reorder, and remove stages of the applicant progression flow for each role.

role-scoring.title: Applicant Scoring System
role-scoring.description: Systematically score applicants using configurable conditions: PDF keyword matching, form field value conditions, and custom scoring weights.

applicant-page.title: Application Detail View
applicant-page.description: Full application detail with candidate information, a stage progression timeline, and the complete email communication history.

applicant-page-2.title: In-App Email Communication
applicant-page-2.description: Admins can compose and send templated, personalized emails to candidates directly from the application page, with full delivery history tracked inline.

ai-analyze-page.title: AI Analytics Report
ai-analyze-page.description: AI evaluates all applicants against a customizable rubric — generating individual strength/weakness reports and an overall candidate pool summary.

list-share.title: List-Share (Expo App + Realtime API)
list-share.description: Expo Router mobile app with Google/Apple/email auth, realtime list collaboration, push notifications, and Cloudinary-backed media on a Prisma/Postgres API.
list-share.longDescription:
Built the List-Share product: Expo 54 (React Native 0.81, React 19) app with typed routes, NativeWind/NativeBase UI, Poppins-driven design, and socket.io-client realtime presence.
API side: Express + Prisma/PostgreSQL with socket.io events, list sharing/roles, cron cleanup, JWT-protected routes, Google/Apple sign-in, Cloudinary uploads (single/multiple, visibility/profile), and API docs via Scalar/Swagger with privacy/support public pages.

data-migration-ingestion.title: Data Migration: Scraping & Ingestion Pipeline
data-migration-ingestion.description: Performed large-scale data scraping and ingestion to migrate substantial datasets into new database systems with complex transformations.
data-migration-ingestion.longDescription:
Implemented ingestion flows that handled data transformation, integrity constraints, and migration into new database schemas.
Focused on correctness, consistency, and reliability under real-world messy data.

pixel-perfect-ui.title: Pixel-Accurate UI Implementation
pixel-perfect-ui.description: Implemented pixel-perfect interfaces from detailed Figma designs, ensuring strict adherence to client requirements.
pixel-perfect-ui.longDescription:
Delivered high-precision UI work across production applications, translating design specs into clean, maintainable components
while keeping performance and scalability in mind.

exp-moveo.description: Full stack development at Moveo Group.

exp-oversight.description: End-to-end feature development across web and mobile applications in production environments.
achievements: Shipped multiple major app versions with functional and architectural changes to live mobile apps serving 2,000+ active users
Delivered complex features to production systems serving 300,000+ users and handling 1,000+ leads/month
Performed large-scale data scraping and ingestion to migrate substantial datasets into new database systems, including complex transformations and integrity constraints
Analyzed complex system and business logic issues directly with customers and designed technical solutions to meet requirements
Implemented pixel-accurate UI from detailed Figma designs with strict adherence to design requirements

exp-oversight-1.description: Conducted manual testing and quality assurance for web systems and applications to ensure reliability and performance prior to production releases.
achievements: Performed comprehensive manual testing on web systems and applications, including identification of complex issues.
Accurately documented bugs, reproduction steps, and impact analysis.
Collaborated closely with developers to validate fixes and ensure system stability prior to production releases.
Contributed to improving quality processes and reducing recurring issues.
